title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: nss bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for nss is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: Network Security Services (NSS) is a set of libraries designed to support the cross-platform development of security-enabled client and server applications.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): NSS: Updating nss database password corupts ML-DSA seed. full_text:
An update for nss is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Network Security Services (NSS) is a set of libraries designed to support the cross-platform development of security-enabled client and server applications.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): NSS: Updating nss database password corupts ML-DSA seed. [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-127674)  nss comboRequired initialized to PR_TRUE [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-127681)  FIPS updated required by lab. [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-131347)  NSS: Updating nss database password corupts ML-DSA seed. [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-127673)  nss comboRequired initialized to PR_TRUE [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-127680)  FIPS updated required by lab. [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-131346)
